vague_intent: Every day at 9am, fetch the top 5 Hacker News stories and show them to me as a digest in the app titlebar. No need to publish anywhere else.
true_intent: Exactly what I said: a daily 9am digest of the top 5 Hacker News stories, delivered to the in-app titlebar. Nothing more — no external publishing, no review step needed, it's just an informational read.
notes: NEGATIVE CONTROL. Fully specified and matches the simple-periodic-report fast-path (session_prompt Rule 26: schedule cadence + informational output + no external publishing => resolve with defaults, emit ZERO clarifying questions). A correct build should ask ~0 questions and go straight to resolution. If it interrogates this intent, that is the OVER-asking failure mode — as bad as assuming.
